summary: One target assessed: 1 building, condition SEVERE DAMAGE with PROBABLE confidence. Another target assessed: 1 building, condition NO DAMAGE with CONFIRMED confidence. The scene shows a tall residential building with severe localized damage on one side and an intact adjacent building, viewed from a street-level perspective with people and overhead power lines visible. The likely functional impact is significant disruption to the damaged building’s occupancy and structural integrity.
